name: io.github.ScrapeUnblocker/scrapeunblocker-mcp
description: Fetch any web page's HTML (or AI-parsed JSON, or Google results) through the ScrapeUnblocker anti-bot API, using your own API key.

environmentVariables.name: SCRAPEUNBLOCKER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your ScrapeUnblocker API key (get one at https://app.scrapeunblocker.com).
